title: Aurora, Sparkle Tales, EIRA The Polar Bear, Soft Toy, 61201, White, 7in, Gift Idea for Children and Adults
features: Part of Aurora's Sparkle Tales range
Adorable polar bear cuddly toy with the trademark Sparkle Tales eyes and sparkly feet
Great gift idea for anyone who loves polar bears
description: The sparkle tales kingdom is a fantasy world where all kinds of magical creatures live. It is a place where fairy tales and imaginations are free to roam. The sparkle tales world consists of forests, desert, sea and a magical castle. Elvira lives in the mirror valley part of the sparkle tales kingdom, in an area covered by ice and snow. Elvira has the most sparkly feet and inner ears, they shine brightly against her super-soft White coat. Elvira has the biggest smile and a cute button nose. She charms everyone she meets.
